name: Picnic Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in a kettle of boiling salt water until tender.
2. Drain and cool enough to peel.
3. Cut into chunks.
4. Separate yolks from whites of hard-cooked eggs.
5. Chop whites and add to potatoes with chopped onions and celery.
6. In a small bowl, mash yolks of eggs.
7. Stir in mayonnaise, milk, vinegar, mustard, sugar, salt, and pepper.
8. Pour over the potatoes.
9. Toss well.
10. Adjust seasonings if necessary.
11. Spoon into serving bowl.
12. Garnish with sliced hard-cooked eggs and paprika.
13. Refrigerate.
